subcodes.first_line: Dominion belongeth unto God, Who, through a wave cast from the ocean of His trials, hath drowned vast multitudes whose number none can reckon save His Own Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الامر لله الذی بموج من امواج بحر امتحانه غرق خلق کثیر لم یحص عدتهم الا نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
